violations.description: Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Food on display for self service was not properly protected by food guards, display cases, or similarly effective means. Hot dog roller at customer self service counter not provided with adequate sneeze protection.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Customer self service cabinets/counter have multiple areas of water damage.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Food display protection, condiment protection, clean tableware usage, sign posted (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Food display protection, condiment protection, clean tableware usage, sign posted (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
